final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-healing
Asset type: cozy lifestyle illustration, square crop
Primary request: an orange tabby cat lying on a windowsill basking in soft winter light, with a snowy street scene outside the window
Scene/backdrop: warm indoor windowsill, frost-edged glass, snowy quiet street outside with gently falling snowflakes, soft diffused daylight
Subject: fluffy orange tabby cat sprawled lazily on the windowsill, eyes half-closed in contentment, thick plush fur with visible individual strands, paws tucked under body
Style/medium: healing-style illustration, soft digital painting, warm and gentle brushwork
Composition/framing: medium close-up, slight side angle, cat centered on windowsill with window frame as natural border
Lighting/mood: warm golden indoor light contrasting with cool blue-white snowy exterior, cozy and tender mood, emotionally soothing
Color palette: warm amber and cream indoors, cool pale blue and white outside, soft orange fur as focal warmth
Materials/textures: ultra-fluffy fur with layered soft strands, smooth wooden windowsill, frosted glass with condensation, delicate falling snowflakes
Avoid: harsh outlines, cold or sterile atmosphere, flat textures, deformed cat anatomy
